scripts.check:effect: effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/config/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/protocol/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/effect-utils/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/client/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/column-live-view-engine/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/runtime-core/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/in-memory/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/server/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project packages/effect-view-server/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project apps/example/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && vp run -w examples:check:effect
scripts.check:internal-seams: tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --module preserve --moduleResolution bundler scripts/node-ambient.d.ts scripts/check-internal-seams.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-internal-seams.ts
scripts.check:package-exports: tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --module preserve --moduleResolution bundler scripts/node-ambient.d.ts scripts/check-package-exports.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-package-exports.ts
scripts.grpc:gate: vp run -w ready && vp run -w bench:baseline:grpc-materialized && vp run -w bench:baseline:grpc-leased && vp run -w bench:baseline:grpc-leased-retained
scripts.examples:check:effect: effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/in-memory-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/kafka-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/grpc-leased-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/grpc-materialized-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/combined-sources-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/ssr-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict && effect-language-service diagnostics --project examples/tcp-publisher-react/tsconfig.json --format text --strict
scripts.examples:build: vp run @effect-view-server/example-in-memory-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-kafka-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-grpc-leased-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-grpc-materialized-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-combined-sources-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-ssr-react#build && vp run @effect-view-server/example-tcp-publisher-react#build
scripts.examples:test: vp run @effect-view-server/example-in-memory-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-kafka-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-grpc-leased-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-grpc-materialized-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-combined-sources-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-ssr-react#test && vp run @effect-view-server/example-tcp-publisher-react#test && vp run -w examples:check:effect
scripts.ready: vp run -r build && vp run -w check:package-exports && vp run -w check:internal-seams && vp run -w test:repository-scripts && vp check && vp run -w check:effect && vp run --filter '@effect-view-server/*' --filter '!@effect-view-server/runtime' test && vp run effect-view-server#test && vp run @effect-view-server/runtime#test
scripts.pre-grpc:gate: vp run -w ready && vp run -w bench:baseline:smoke && vp run -w bench:baseline:raw-read-write && vp run -w bench:baseline:active-query-sharing && vp run -w bench:baseline:grouped-admission && vp run -w bench:baseline:grouped-order-neutral && vp run -w bench:baseline:websocket-firehose && vp run -w bench:baseline:kafka-ingest && vp run -w bench:baseline:kafka-sustained-firehose
scripts.release-candidate:capacity: vp run -w examples:test && vp run -w examples:build && vp run -w pre-grpc:gate && vp run -w grpc:gate && vp run -w bench:baseline:release
scripts.test:repository-scripts: vp test run scripts/benchmark-baseline.test.ts scripts/benchmark-baseline-runner.test.ts scripts/bench-runtime-kafka-ingest.test.ts scripts/check-internal-seams.test.ts scripts/release-publish-policy.test.ts --coverage
